market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: ‘What's happening at the EF?’ Ethereum community looking for answers after high-profile departures
articles.description: A wave of recent high-profile departures at the Ethereum Foundation has reignited longstanding questions from community members about what is going on inside the organization.

articles.title: OpenAI co-founder Andrej Karpathy joins Anthropic’s pre-training team
articles.description: Andrej Karpathy has joined Anthropic to work on pre-training. He previously co-founded and worked at OpenAI and led computer vision and AI at Tesla.

articles.title: Hackers have compromised dozens of popular open source packages in an ongoing supply chain attack
articles.description: The attacks are part of a wider campaign known as Mini Shai-Hulud, which has already compromised several open source projects and, in turn, developers and companies that use them.

articles.title: Former BNY exec launches NUVA, bets tokenization will remake Wall Street
articles.description: NUVA launched this week with nearly $19 billion in tokenized real-world assets from Figure Technologies, aiming to bring regulated U.S. yield products into DeFi.

articles.title: US cyber agency CISA exposed reams of passwords and cloud keys to the open web
articles.description: The federal cybersecurity agency left plaintext passwords in a spreadsheet uploaded to a public GitHub repository, per a report by independent journalist Brian Krebs.

articles.title: Senator Elizabeth Warren accuses U.S. regulator of approving unqualified crypto banks
articles.description: The Senate Banking Committee's top Democrat sent a letter to the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency questioning the charters of nine crypto firms.

articles.title: 21Shares says Hyperliquid ETF demand shows appetite for 24/7 trading
articles.description: 21Shares says strong early flows into its new Hyperliquid ETF reflect growing investor demand for around-the-clock access to crypto and traditional assets.

articles.title: Polymarket unlocks $5 trillion private market for retail traders, previously reserved for elites
articles.description: Polymarket’s new private-company prediction markets let retail traders bet on startup milestones once reserved for Wall Street insiders.

articles.title: Crypto IPO boom stalls as AI frenzy reshapes tech markets, says Fundstrat exec
articles.description: Crypto firms are pausing long-awaited IPO plans as weak trading volumes and macro pressures weigh on valuations despite boom in AI-linked tech listings.

articles.title: Recent Bitcoin holders sell $770M BTC at a loss amid $65K BTC price calls
articles.description: More than 10,000 Bitcoin have been sold at a loss by short-term holders in recent days, adding fuel to analysts’ predictions that BTC price will fall to $65,000.

articles.title: Live markets: Bitcoin gives up $77,000 as interest rates continue surge, stocks continue slump
articles.description: Crypto markets have turned lower in morning U.S. trade on Tuesday as the idea of coming rate hikes takes a toll on risk assets.

articles.title: Bitcoin miner Canaan posts $88.7M net loss in Q1 amid BTC decline
articles.description: Canaan’s Q1 results were dragged down by a $25 million inventory write-down and a 75% quarterly drop in equipment sales as Bitcoin prices retreated from their highs.

articles.title: Apple announces Apple Intelligence powered accessibility feature updates
articles.description: Apple is introducing a feature to let Vision Pro control a compatible wheelchair with their eyes

articles.title: ‘Survivor’ stars Kyle Fraser and Kamilla Karthigesu introduce  a goal-tracking app, Paprclip
articles.description: A new app from Survivor 48 winner Kyle Fraser and castmate Kamilla Karthigesu aims to turn goal tracking into a social experience, pairing users for accountability, daily challenges, and shared progress clips.

articles.title: Forget the feed: Status AI raises $17M to turn social media into interactive entertainment
articles.description: Interactive social media site Status  announced Tuesday $17 million in combined seed and Series A funding, with investors including General Catalyst, YC, LightShed Ventures, and Abstract.

articles.title: JPMorgan says ether and altcoins won't catch up to bitcoin without a major network boom
articles.description: The bank said ether and the broader altcoin market continue to trail bitcoin as weak network activity, sluggish DeFi growth and limited real-world adoption weigh on investor demand.

articles.title: 表面平靜的宇宙巨獸，錢卓拉望遠鏡揭開 Abell 2029 星系團的驚天碰撞
articles.description: 星系團是宇宙中由重力聚集而成的大型構造，內部包含數百甚至數千個星系、大量暗物質，以及充滿星系之間的高溫氣體。這 […]

articles.title: Estonian regulator partially suspends Zondacrypto operator license
articles.description: Estonia’s FIU has partially suspended BB Trade Estonia OÜ’s license, giving the Zondacrypto operator 30 days to fix compliance issues or risk full revocation.

articles.title: Zcash is 'running its own bull market' as ZEC price paints 88% rally setup
articles.description: ZEC has jumped 18% in three days as privacy coins rally, defying a 3.45% drop across the wider crypto market.

articles.title: South Korean funeral company records $33M unrealized loss on leveraged ETH ETFs
articles.description: South Korea’s seventh-largest mutual aid company is currently sitting on a $33 million paper loss on its leveraged Ether ETF investment, following the crypto market downturn.
